Superior Power Backup for Siddipet Households

Are you facing long power cuts in Siddipet or nearby mandals? Royal Batteries specializes in high-capacity home inverter systems. As an Exide CARE authorized dealer, we bring industrial-grade tubular batteries directly to your doorstep in Siddipet, Dubbak, and beyond.

Our Inverter Battery Specialities

  • Exide InvaTubular: India's #1 tubular battery for deep-cycle performance.
  • Fast Charging: Designed to charge quickly even during short power supply windows.
  • Extended Lifespan: Our tall tubular batteries typically last 54–60 months.
  • Free Home Installation: Professional mounting and wiring check by our technicians.

FAQ

Inverter Battery FAQs

How long does a 150AH inverter battery last?
On a standard home load (3 fans, 3 lights), a 150AH battery usually provides 5–6 hours of backup. High-capacity 200AH batteries can last 8–10 hours.
Do you deliver inverter batteries to villages near Siddipet?
Yes! We deliver to Dubbak, Nangnoor, Chinnakodur, Kondapak, and all surrounding villages from our Gajwel hub. Delivery is same-day.
Which is better, Flat plate or Tubular?
For rural areas with long power cuts, Tubular batteries (like Exide InvaTubular) are much better as they handle deep discharges and have a 4–5 year lifespan.

Gajwel's trusted Exide CARE authorized battery dealer since 2005. Serving Siddipet, Medak, and Sangareddy districts with genuine batteries, professional fitting, and 50+ km doorstep delivery.
